title: [FATAL] [lib.rs:478] ["Rem resulted in NaN: FloatIsNan"]
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
```sql
CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO t1 (c1) VALUES (1.0E307);
SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE DEGREES(c1) MOD c1;
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
 The server should not crash down.
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
A fata error is returned.
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->

Git Branch: HEAD

poc: SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE DEGREES(c1) MOD c1;
key_bug_features: DEGREES function with large DOUBLE value causes NaN error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c1 DOUBLE, c2 INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO t2 (c1, c2) VALUES (1.0E308, NULL);
SELECT DEGREES(c1) FROM t2 WHERE c2 = 0;
